name: @chipallen2/snazi
description: On-demand local gate for your messages. Reveals WHO contacted you; only reveals WHAT for approved senders. iMessage today, pluggable channels next.

scripts.test: npm run build && node test/address.test.cjs && node test/cache.test.cjs && node test/both-sides.test.cjs && node test/serve-names.test.cjs && node test/channels.test.cjs && node test/send.test.cjs && node test/contacts.test.cjs && node test/serve-contacts.test.cjs && node test/gmail.test.cjs && node test/outlook.test.cjs && node test/outlook-calendar.test.cjs && node test/serve-send.test.cjs && node test/filters.test.cjs && node test/serve-filters.test.cjs && node test/serve-calendar.test.cjs && node test/service.test.cjs
